title: LAV 6X Multicolour 290ml Adora Tumbler Glasses - Stemless Kitchen Water Whiskey Wine Gin Juice Cocktail Drinking Glass Set
features: The Adora range of Tumbler Glasses from LAV serves as a representation of the company's ongoing commitment to bring contemporary design and innovative styling to your drinking glassware.

Taking inspiration from the immediately distinctive "bell pepper" base found on carbonated soft drink bottles worldwide, these tumblers are sure to stand out in any setting, evoking a cool, refreshing nostalgia for hazy summer days spent gallivanting with childhood friends.
The unique shape provides a practical benefit, too - lending extra strength and stability to help protect against spillages.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: The Adora range of Whisky Glass Glasses by LAV serves as a representation of the company's constant commitment to contemporary design and innovative style, with vibrant multicolored bases that provide a youthful twist on grown-up glass. Taking inspiration from the instantly distinctive 'pepper' base found on carbonated drink bottles around the world, these drives are sure to stand out in any setting, evoking a cool, refreshing nostalgia for the hazy gallivanting summer days spent with childhood friends. The unique shape provides a practical benefit, too -. lending extra strength and stability to help protect against leaks Capable of holding up to 290ml, these glasses make jars perfect for serving your favorite Scotch, Bourbon or Whiskey - as well as soft drinks, juices and water too. As with all LAV glassware, Occhiali Adora whiskey glasses are dishwasher safe for hassle-free cleaning. Whether shopping for business or pleasure, when it comes to products that effortlessly straddle the gap between fashion and functionality, the Adora collection of drinking glass glasses is sure to fill your home with LAV. Discover today's line.
